title: Getting unexpectedly "Warning-REALCVT: Implicit conversion of real to integer", but only for certain values

features.name: struct packed with real field and real literal assignment
features.description: Code should include a packed struct containing both integer and real fields, with real literal values assigned to the real field
features.snippet:
struct packed { int coins; real dollars; } wallet;
initial wallet = '{5, -2.0};

features.name: real literal with fractional value in struct packed assignment
features.description: Code should include a real literal with fractional part assigned to a real field within a struct packed
features.snippet:
struct packed { int a; real b; } s;
initial s = '{1, 2.5};

features.name: negative real literal in struct packed assignment
features.description: Code should include a negative real literal assigned to a real field within a struct packed
features.snippet:
struct packed { int a; real b; } s;
initial s = '{1, -2.0};
